use_cases: Interactive button for forms, calls-to-action, and user submissions
Trigger actions like submit, cancel, or navigation within applications
Multi-variant button system for primary, secondary, and destructive actions
ai_summary: A reusable React Button component with CVA-based variant system supporting multiple styles (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built on Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility, it provides accessible button functionality with standard focus states and disabled handling. Standard design system button suitable for SaaS and general web applications.
